tools.name: search_flights
tools.description: Search Amadeus sandbox flight offers. Input: origin, destination, departure_date, optional return_date, passengers. Output is normalized options with price, airline, times, baggage hint, cancellation hint, and booking_url.

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description: Search Amadeus sandbox hotel offers. Input: city, checkin_date, checkout_date, guests. The server resolves hotel IDs first, then calls hotel-offers and returns normalized hotel name, rating, nightly price, policies, and booking_url.

tools.name: get_offer_details
tools.description: Return full normalized details for one cached offer_id, including cancellation policy and baggage or room policy before Anna asks the user for confirmation.

tools.name: open_booking_url
tools.description: Open a selected booking_url in the system browser after Anna summarizes options and the user confirms. This tool never handles payment.
